title: Climate Data Package
text: name explains , package meant help process immense amount data Climate Canada. work? Hopefully! make promises. simple structure format, limited . package specifically includes: - database creation function (labelled con) - Embedded meta data listing current weather stations Canada - Sanity checks check database can help create either dataframes plots

title: Climate Data Package
text: ‘build_climate_database()’ : Creates database ‘check_missing_stations()’ : Compares stations database metadata ‘get_repeated_observations()’: Checks repeated observations ‘get_time_gaps()’ : Checks data time gaps greater 1 hour ‘get_observation_ranges()’ : Min Max observation ranges stations ‘get_missing_over_time()’ : Percentage missing data ‘get_missing_ratio()’ : Proportion missing data ‘get_station_file()’ : Accesses embedded meta data ; need run user
